data_quality_notes: PARC index not publicly available as a machine-readable dataset. Approach 1: IPBES PDF URL (https://www.ipbes.net/sites/default/files/Metadata_GEO_BON_Protected_Area_Representativeness_Index.pdf) contains only metadata. Approach 2: World Bank searches for 'protected area representativeness', 'biodiversity protected area quality', etc. returned no PARC data. Approach 3 (SUBSTITUTION): Used 'Marine protected areas (% of territorial waters)' (WB: ER.MRN.PTMR.ZS) as an approximate proxy. This measures protected area coverage of key biodiversity areas rather than representativeness per se, but is conceptually related — higher KBA/PA coverage implies better representativeness of priority sites. This is an exploratory substitution.
summary: Using Marine protected areas (% of territorial waters) as a proxy for Protected Area Representativeness (PARC). Pearson r=0.351 (p=0.0000), Spearman rho=0.441. Partial r=0.300 (p=0.0000) controlling for log(GPC). n=1692 obs, 141 countries. Verdict: confirmed.
